complaint_title: Package marked as delivered but never arrived
complaint_text: I received an email stating my package was delivered to my front porch yesterday at 2:00 PM, but I've checked everywhere and it's not here. I even asked my neighbors and checked my security camera footage. The driver didn't even stop at my house. This contained urgent medical supplies that I need immediately. I tried calling customer support but was on hold for over 45 minutes before being disconnected.

My credit card statement shows that I was charged $49.99 twice on the same day for my monthly Pro subscription. I logged into my account, and it only shows one active subscription. This overdrafted my bank account and now I have fees. I need a refund immediately and someone to explain why your billing system is double charging customers without authorization.

complaint_title: Platform completely unresponsive during critical workflow
complaint_text: The entire platform has been throwing 502 Bad Gateway errors for the last 3 hours. Our entire sales team relies on this tool to process orders, and we are losing thousands of dollars an hour. I tried reaching out to my dedicated account manager, but they are out of office. The status page says all systems are operational, which is completely false. Unacceptable uptime for an enterprise SLA.

complaint_title: Still waiting for refund after 3 weeks
complaint_text: I returned order #88392 three weeks ago. Tracking shows it was received at your warehouse on Oct 5th. Your policy states refunds take 5-7 business days. It's been 15 business days. Every time I email support, I get an automated response saying it's 'processing'. I want my $250 back immediately or I will initiate a chargeback with my credit card company.

complaint_title: Cannot cancel subscription, button is broken
complaint_text: I have been trying to cancel my subscription for the past 4 days before my renewal date. When I click the 'Cancel Subscription' button in my account settings, it just spins endlessly and never loads the confirmation page. I suspect this is intentional to prevent cancellations. Please cancel my account immediately and do not charge me for the upcoming month.

complaint_title: Shipment delayed by 2 weeks without notice
complaint_text: I ordered inventory for my store a month ago. It was supposed to arrive last Friday. The tracking hasn't updated in 12 days and just says 'In Transit'. I never received any email about a delay. Now I don't have stock for my weekend sale and will lose significant revenue. Logistics coordination is a complete mess. Who is accountable for this?

I called to get help setting up my new smart home device. The agent I spoke with (I think his name was Mark) was extremely condescending, audibly sighed when I asked questions, and eventually hung up on me before the issue was resolved. I've been a loyal customer for 5 years and have never been treated with such disrespect. I want someone from management to review that call.

complaint_title: Item arrived damaged and packaging was destroyed
complaint_text: The blender I ordered arrived yesterday, but the box was crushed and ripped open on one side. When I took the blender out, the glass pitcher was shattered into a hundred pieces. There was zero protective bubble wrap inside the box. It's incredibly negligent to ship fragile glass items with absolutely no padding. I need a replacement shipped overnight at your expense.
